auth_access_model: The published ontology artifacts are currently public and readable without credentials.
identifier_systems: shared OWL and SKOS term identifiers

discovery_search.note: The current skill searches and fetches published JSON-LD terms.

metadata_schema.note: Ontology metadata, labels, definitions, and term IRIs are exposed.

entity_lookup.note: Ontology-term lookup exists, but operational stock/site identity lookup does not.

identifier_crosswalks.note: The ontology can model mappings and bridge artifacts, but it is not itself the operational crosswalk graph.

abundance_assessment.note: Some shared concepts exist, but domain coverage is not yet tracked as a verified platform capability matrix.

telemetry_passage.note: Term coverage may exist, but the repo has not verified that surface as a maintained capability contract.

hatchery.note: The repo has not yet verified hatchery-semantic coverage as a maintained contract.

harvest_fishery.note: The repo has not yet verified fishery-semantic coverage as a maintained contract.

genetics_gsi.note: The repo has not yet verified genetics or GSI semantic coverage as a maintained contract.

package_metadata_export.note: The ontology is a semantic layer, not a package/export engine.

provenance_versioning.note: Published ontology metadata exposes version and modification details.

bulk_access_api_ergonomics.note: Published JSON-LD is machine-readable, but there is no richer first-class API surface.

blockers: The ontology is schema, not operational instance data.
The repo does not yet maintain a verified domain-coverage matrix against every salmon subdomain.
governance_constraints: Shared-term promotion should stay conservative and evidence-based.
